heading: Effective date
label: 1976 Effective date
text: The insurance provided for in this subchapter and the deductions and contributions for that purpose shall take effect on the date designated by the Secretary and certified by the Secretary to each Secretary concerned.
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 776 of this title1986— substituted “the Administrator” for “him” after “certified by”.Pub. L. 99–576

Interim Coverage Until Effective Date of Group Plan; $5,000 Death Gratuity, , , as amended by –(d), , , provided for payment of a death gratuity of up to $5,000 in certain cases of death of veterans while in active military, naval, or air service during the period from , to the date immediately preceding the date on which the Servicemen’s Group Life Insurance program was placed in effect under this section, and required that an application for such gratuity had to be made within one year after .Pub. L. 89–214, § 379 Stat. 886Pub. L. 89–730, § 6(a)80 Stat. 1159Sept. 29, 1965Nov. 2, 1966Jan. 1, 1957Sept. 29, 1965, , , provided that any waiver of future benefits executed by any person under (see above), as in effect prior to , was to have no effect.Pub. L. 89–730, § 6(e)80 Stat. 1159section 3(a) of Pub. L. 89–214Nov. 2, 1966Nov. 2, 1966, , , provided that in any case in which the death gratuity paid to any person under (see above), was reduced pursuant to clause (B) of subsection (c)(1) of such section, as in effect prior to , the Administrator of Veterans’ Affairs was to pay to such person an amount equal to the amount by which such death gratuity was reduced.Pub. L. 89–730, § 6(f)80 Stat. 1159section 3 of Pub. L. 89–214Nov. 2, 1966Nov. 2, 1966, , , provided that notwithstanding the time limitation prescribed in (see above), any application for death gratuity filed under such section shall be valid if filed within one year after .Pub. L. 89–730, § 6(g)80 Stat. 1159section 3(a) of Pub. L. 89–214Nov. 2, 1966Nov. 2, 1966
